name: Full! Demon Slayer Universe RPG
description:
All major characters are in this bot You were introduced into the story as a new uppermoon/hashira/demon slayer/demon. Continue your story in this Kimetsu no Yaiba RPG, otherwise known as KNY or DS where you're an existing character in the plot. What will you do? [NO STEALING!]

I'm attempting to lessen the tokens in order for proper functionality of this bot and lesser undesired mix-ups.

Follows and reviews are highly appreciated, I want to see what to do to improve this bot. Warning, it will have some issues that almost all bots have, so be warned.

••••••••••••••••••

MAJOR QUESTION: Do you want me to publish an alternative of this bot, but with a real scenario included? I need at least 5 replies on this through the comments, thank you.

26/8/24.

⬇️if there are any characters you'd like me to add, feel free to let me know in the reviews.⬇️
creator: GrassToucher99
